revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop. 6 content files produced from Danilo's 6 content tabs + web research across 3 domains (DTC referral, community platforms, UGC). Key Danilo overrides: removed 'more complete than LMNT' comparative claim (legal risk), phased community approach instead of immediate Facebook Group, added FTC compliance framework to all creator-facing docs.
revisions.quality_rationale: Solid research-backed content across 6 files with 6 dialogue upgrades. Three significant Danilo corrections (LMNT claim, compliance embedding, phased community). Weakened by: pre-launch status (no real data), some research from early 2025 training data, inherent scope breadth (referral + community + UGC).

files.referral_program.json: Referral program architecture: $10/$10 store credit, phased platform rollout, benchmarks, best-in-class examples.
files.community_strategy.md: Community platform evaluation (7 platforms) with phased recommendation: email-first → Skool test → Circle at scale.
files.ugc_brand_brief.md: Creator content guidelines: approved/prohibited claims, FTC compliance, visual requirements.
files.ugc_library.json: UGC tracking database: creator, rights, quality, performance, compliance.
files.ugc_brief_template.md: Production-ready creator brief template with content flow, hook frameworks, compliance, product usage instructions.
files.ugc_creator_program.json: Creator program structure: economics, sourcing platforms, vetting, payment, budget tiers, hit rates, fatigue timelines.
files.opkit_referral_community_ugc.md: OpKit OK-M22-001: Reusable Referral, Community & UGC Growth Kit for DTC consumables.
files.dialogue_summary.md: Persona dialogue transcript: 4 rounds, 3 personas (Skeptical Investor, Growth Hacker, Regulatory Counsel), 6 upgrades, saturated.
